prompt: This repo is still deployed on Deno Deploy Classic and uses Deno.openKv plus a custom domain. Please inspect the codebase, tell me what needs to change for the new Deploy platform, and give me a concrete KV migration plan. Don't just tell me to email support unless it's truly blocked.
assertions: References https://docs.deno.com/deploy/migration_guide/ or explicitly names the official Deploy Classic migration guide.
Separates code-inspection findings from manual dashboard steps.
Provides a KV migration path with preview or dry-run behavior before real import.
Keeps support@deno.com as a fallback rather than the only migration path.
